name: Rattle Shake
description: Rattle Shake is a yellow rattlesnake cowboy who is a SWAP Force Skylander in Skylanders: Swap Force. He is of the Undead element. His Swap Force Ability is Bounce. He has a Frito-Lays exclusive glow-in-a-dark variant, Quickdraw Rattle Shake.
biography: Some say Rattle Shake was the best tracker in the Cloudbreak Islands. Others say he could strike the center of a gold coin at a thousand paces. But the legend of Rattle Shake was immortalized when he found himself trapped by the Black Hat Gang, the infamous group of cowboys who literally were large cows... and evil ones at that. They threatened to plunder the local village unless Rattle Shake led them inside the magical volcano Mt. Cloudbreak, where they hoped to discover enchanted treasure. Badly outnumbered, the ever calm Rattle Shake magically summoned every snake in the area and overtook the notorious bovines in an epic fight. The tale of his heroism was heard by Master Eon, who then recruited him to the Skylanders.
personality: Shake's enemies think he is sinister. In fact, so do some of his friends, but you can be sure that he's no slippery character - Rattle is a virtuous viper. He is calm and collected, handling situations with the poise of a classic gunslinger.

story.content: During development, Rattle Shake was originally designed as a zombie cowboy with detachable legs, armed with normal or phantom pistols. His Swap ability was originally Dig. Another concept had his legs replaced with a patchwork serpent's tail, and his ghost pistols became a mini-gun made from bones. In the end, Rattle Shake became an anthropomorphic snake, originally wielding a snake gun in each hand. His snake gun was also inspired from the boomerang attack of the scrapped Skylander, Breezewing. Rattle Shake was initially poorly received during kid playtesting because his secondary attack made him spring backwards and he originally fired little snakes, which was seen as creepy because he was 'shooting his children'.

Some say Rattle Shake was the best tracker in the Cloudbreak Islands. Others say he could strike the center of a gold coin at a thousand paces. But the legend of Rattle Shake was immortalized when he found himself trapped by the Black Hat Gang, the infamous group of cowboys who literally were large cows... and evil ones at that. They threatened to plunder the local village unless Rattle Shake led them inside the magical volcano Mt. Cloudbreak, where they hoped to discover enchanted treasure. Badly outnumbered, the ever calm Rattle Shake magically summoned every snake in the area and overtook the notorious bovines in an epic fight. The tale of his heroism was heard by Master Eon, who then recruited him to the Skylanders.

content: A cool place to rattle around!
It's true, amigo, you truly do suck!
Think again my friend! We can swap 16 ways!

trivia: His catchphrase is a play on 'Go ahead, make my day'.
His quote 'No fang, no gain' is a play on 'no pain, no gain'.
He resembles Rattlesnake Jake, a gunslinger rattlesnake character from the Nickelodeon movie, Rango.
He and Fire Kraken are the only two with the Bounce swap ability.
Despite being a cowboy, he has a Spanish accent instead of a Texas accent, inspired by Mexican vaqueros.
Like Wash Buckler, if a player puts a hat on Rattle Shake, his original hat disappears.
Rattle Shake, Cobra Cadabra, Pit Boss and Fire Vipers are currently the only four known snake characters who have two limbs.
He and Scorp are the only two Skylanders who can poison their enemies.
He, Night Shift, Doom Stone, and Magna Charge are the only four Swap Force Skylanders without any true legs.
He is the first Undead Skylander to have an exclusive non-Legendary variant figure, Quickdraw Rattle Shake.
He and Rubble Rouser are the only two SWAP Force Skylanders with top Soul Gems that change the colors of their skin (to purple).
He is voiced by Troy Baker, who based the voice on Antonio Banderas.
His snake gun was inspired from the boomerang attack of the scrapped Skylander, Breezewing.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Rattle Shake (Go Ahead - Snake my Day)
Skylanders Swap Force - Rattle Shake Soul Gem Preview (Go Ahead - Snake My Day)

gameplay: Rattle Shake is a ranged attacker who utilizes a snake launcher to shoot venom or charge up bouncy snakes. His primary attack, Snake's Venom, fires blobs of poison. His secondary attack, Tail Sweep, is a quick melee strike, while his tertiary Deputy Snake ability deploys a snake turret. As a SWAP Force character with the Bounce ability, he can perform high jumps and ground slams. His upgrades allow him to poison enemies, summon skeletal snakes, and launch bone projectiles.

basic.name: Snake's Venom
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot snake venom at nearby enemies.

basic.name: Tail Sweep
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to sweep at nearby enemies with a quick tail strike.

basic_upgrades.name: Deputy Snake
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to throw down a snake ally that will attack and slow nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Fistful of Snakes
basic_upgrades.content: All venom projectiles do increased damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Spring Loaded Snake
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge a Snake Shot, release to shoot a snake that bounces between enemies and collects items along the way.

basic_upgrades.name: Bounce the Bones
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot one bouncing bone projectile.

basic_upgrades.name: On Brand
basic_upgrades.content: Hold jump to jump and smash down into the ground, damaging and knocking enemies away.

basic_upgrades.name: Sssstampede
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 to shoot three large bone projectiles at once.

soulgems.name: Raise the Snakes
soulgems.content: Get a new skin which increases Critical Hit and absorbs damage. Absorbing damage causes the skin to shed then grow back over time.

soulgems.name: The Snake-Skinned Kid
soulgems.content: Get a new skin which increases speed and absorbs damage. Absorbing damage causes skin to shed then grow back after a short time.

abilities.name: Nasty Sssurprise
abilities.content: Deputy Snake causes an acid explosion that damages enemies where it lands.

abilities.name: Armed to the Fangs
abilities.content: Nasty Sssuprise radius and Deputy Snake damage are increased.

abilities.name: Snake Bite
abilities.content: Spring Loaded Snake poisons the first enemy it hits, dealing damage over time.

abilities.name: This Bites
abilities.content: Enemies poisoned by Spring Loaded Snake take more damage from Snake Venom.

abilities.name: Goliath Bone Snake
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge Sssstampede, release to summon a giant bone snake from the ground.

abilities.name: Dances With Snakes
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 while moving to charge Goliath Bone Snake, release to summon many bone snakes.

abilities.name: Spurred Spring
abilities.content: Hold Attack 2 to charge Sssstampede, release to spring forward, damaging all enemies in the way.

abilities.name: Graveyard Smash
abilities.content: Spurred Spring causes tombstones to appear and damage enemies in a large area when landing.
